app.title: JVMind — JVM Performance Analyzer
app.name: JVMind
sidebar.quota_reset: Built-in AI calls reset monthly. BYOK custom-model calls are unmetered.
sidebar.memory_placeholder: Type a fact and press Enter...
sidebar.session_counter_full: 💬 Session limit reached ({used}/{limit}), delete old sessions to create new
sidebar.sessions_full: Session limit reached. Delete old sessions first.
sidebar.sessions_full_tip: Session limit reached, delete old sessions first
demo.notice_1: {uploads} file uploads + {calls} AI calls per day, reset at 0:00
demo.notice_2: Data shared: other trial users can see your sessions
demo.notice_4: Upload a GC log or jstack thread dump to start analysis
demo.notice_5: Shared account: multi-login may cause session conflicts. Register a free account for your own space
demo.notice_5_html: Shared account: multi-login may cause session conflicts. {link}Register{/link} a free account for your own space
billing.title: Billing
billing.cancel_at_period_end: Subscription will cancel at the end of the current period.
billing.cancel_confirm: Cancel this subscription at the end of the current period?
billing.active_sub_no_change: Your subscription is still active. You cannot change plans or billing cycles mid-subscription. Please wait for expiry or cancel first.
billing.managed_by_owner: Team billing is managed by the team owner. You can view it but cannot make changes.
billing.not_configured: Billing is not configured. Please contact an administrator.
billing.coming_soon: Paid plans coming soon. Stay tuned! 🚀
billing.switch_cycle_confirm: Switching billing cycle will prorate the difference and take effect immediately. Continue?
billing.sync_failed: Sync failed. Please open billing and manually refresh.
billing.paddle_unavailable: Payment system unavailable. Please refresh and try again.
billing.subscription_active: Subscription is still active, no renewal needed.
billing.upgrade_success: Upgraded to {plan}! Difference prorated, effective immediately.
billing.seats_updated: Seats updated. Difference will be prorated.
billing.demo_blocked: Demo accounts cannot make purchases. Please register first.
billing.free_plan_no_checkout: Free plan does not require checkout
billing.price_not_configured: Plan pricing not configured. Please contact administrator.
billing.cancel_ok: Subscription scheduled for cancellation at period end.
billing.seats_only_increase: Seats can only be increased, not decreased.
billing.prorate_seats: Difference will be prorated, effective immediately
billing.confirm_upgrade: Confirm upgrading to Team {cycle} plan with {seats} seats?
billing.refund_confirm:
Request a 7-day refund? The more you use, the less you get back.
After refund, your plan will be downgraded to Free and usage will reset.
billing.refund_team_warn: Note: Refund will disband the team. All {seats} members will be downgraded to Free.
admin.billing_managed_by: This user's billing is managed by team owner {user}.
admin.billing_global_hint: Review subscriptions, revenue, invoices, and Paddle configuration health.
admin.billing_health_missing_api_key: Missing PADDLE_API_KEY. Checkout and subscription actions are unavailable.
admin.billing_health_missing_webhook_sec: Missing PADDLE_WEBHOOK_SECRET. Webhooks cannot be verified.
admin.billing_health_invalid_environment: PADDLE_ENVIRONMENT should be sandbox or production.
admin.billing_health_missing_price_ids: Some public paid plans are missing Paddle price IDs.
admin.billing_reconcile_hint: Compare local subscription/invoice records with Paddle to detect discrepancies (ghost subscriptions, stale subscriptions, plan drift, missing invoices).
admin.billing_reconcile_no_diff: No discrepancies found. All records are in sync.
chat.empty_desc: Select a session from the sidebar or create a new one
chat.config_prompt: ⚠️ Please configure your API Key and model in ⚙️ Settings first.
chat.input_placeholder: Type a message, Enter to send, Shift+Enter for new line...
chat.hint: Agent streams thoughts, tool calls, and final answer in real-time
chat.no_session: Please select or create a session first
chat.feedback_comment_placeholder: Optional: what was wrong or missing?
auth.password_rules: At least 8 characters with letters and numbers
auth.send_code_first: Please send the verification code first
auth.password_invalid: Password must be at least 8 characters with letters and numbers
auth.code_sent: Verification code sent. Please check your email.
auth.email_invalid: Please enter a valid email address
auth.fill_required: Please fill in email, password and verification code
auth.fill_login: Please fill in email account and password
auth.fill_register: Please fill in email, password and verification code
auth.fill_register_no_code: Please fill in email and password
config.title: ⚙️ Model Configuration
config.api_key_placeholder: sk-xxx... Leave empty to keep current
config.api_key_hint: Saved keys are masked; empty or * will not overwrite
config.max_iter_hint: Max tool call rounds per response
config.prompt_extra_hint: Appended to the ReAct system prompt
config.ref_content_hint: AI reads this before analyzing GC/thread dumps for better accuracy
config.no_model: No model configured, please click ⚙️ Settings
config.agent_not_ready: Config saved, but agent not ready: {msg}
config.required_empty: Base URL and model name cannot be empty
config.use_built_in_hint: Choose the model config source. Built-in uses the admin-managed model and consumes your plan's built-in AI call quota; custom uses your own API settings.
config.use_built_in_on_hint: The admin-managed built-in model will be used and counted against your built-in AI call quota.
config.use_custom_model_hint: Your custom model will be used. Fill in the Base URL, API Key, and model below. BYOK custom-model requests do not consume JVMind's built-in AI call quota.
config.free_llm_note: Free users use the system-provided LLM. No personal API key needed.
config.free_save_disabled: Free users cannot configure LLM settings
config.prompt_extra_placeholder: e.g. You are a senior Java performance engineer...
config.ref_content_placeholder:
## JVM Tuning Tips

- Do not manually adjust young gen size with G1
- Full GC over 200ms needs immediate attention...
context.label: Active reports:
context.quota_tip: Up to {limit} reports can be attached as context
gc.upload_zone_text: Click or drag GC log file here
gc.select_or_upload: Select a report from the sidebar or upload a new file
gc.upload_hint: (file_id: {fid}). You can ask the Agent: "Based on the GC log, analyze the throughput"
gc.report_only_hint: Please open a session to analyze this report
gc.error_file_too_large: File too large ({size}MB), exceeds {max}MB limit. Try extracting key log segments.
gc.chart.sampling_note: Showing {shown} / {total} STW events (top 10 by pause time always included)
gc.empty_state_hint: Pick a report from the sidebar or upload a .log / .txt / .gc file to start analysis.
gc.diagnosis_collector_hint: Memory leak/OOM diagnosis only supports Parallel and G1 collectors
jstack.upload_zone_text: Click or drag jstack file here
jstack.upload_zone_hint: Supports .txt / .log / .tdump / .jstack / .json · Max {size}MB · jstack -l or jcmd JSON format
jstack.empty_state_hint: Pick a thread dump from the sidebar or upload a .jstack / .txt file to start analysis.
jstack.select_or_upload: Select a thread dump from the sidebar or upload a new file
jstack.upload_hint: (file_id: {fid}). You can ask the Agent: "Analyze this thread dump"
jstack.deadlock_hint: 💡 Dump threads and analyze lock chains. Restart or manual intervention may be required.
jstack.error_file_too_large: File too large ({size}MB), exceeds {max}MB limit. Try extracting key thread segments.
skills.title: 🧩 Skill Management
skills.extract_desc: Select a conversation to extract as a reusable skill.
skills.extract_json_error: ⚠️ JSON parse failed. Raw model output below (edit manually):
skills.required: Name, description, and instructions are required
skills.form_instr_placeholder: Instructions visible to the Agent when calling this skill
skills.extract_required: Please fill in name, description, and instructions
admin.title: 🛡️ Admin Panel
admin.confirm_reset_quotas: Reset this user's file upload, LLM call, API call counters and LLM cooldown time? Existing reports and upload records will not be deleted.
admin.confirm_delete_user: Are you sure you want to delete user "{user}"? This cannot be undone.
admin.confirm_promote: Grant admin privileges to this user?
admin.confirm_demote: Revoke admin privileges from this user?
admin.org_delete_confirm: Delete this organization? Members and invites will be cleared, sessions become personally owned.
admin.teams_no_org: No organization yet. Create one to collaborate.
error.rate_limit: Too many requests. Max {n} per minute.
error.quota_file: Free users can upload max {n} files. Upgrade for more.
error.quota_llm: Built-in AI call limit reached ({n}/{n}). Resets next month. Pro/Team BYOK custom-model requests do not consume this quota.
error.need_config: Please configure your API Key in ⚙️ Settings
error.free_no_key: Free tier API key not configured. Contact admin to set FREE_TIER_API_KEY.
error.input_blocked: Input blocked: potentially unsafe content detected
error.timeout: LLM request timed out. Check API Key and network.
error.auth_failed: API Key invalid or expired. Update in ⚙️ Settings.
error.filter_upload: File upload limit reached. Upgrade to continue uploading.
lang.name: 中文
sidebar.no_org_team: No team yet. Create or join an organization to share sessions.
admin.auth_settings_hint: Control whether new registrations must enter an email verification code. Email remains the account username even when verification is disabled.
admin.auth_require_email_verification_hi: When enabled, SMTP email must be configured or new users cannot complete registration.
admin.builtin_hint: Free users and Pro/Team users who choose the built-in model will use this config and consume built-in AI call quota. BYOK custom-model requests are unmetered. API keys are stored encrypted.
admin.builtin_api_key_placeholder: Leave empty to keep the saved key
admin.builtin_key_set: API Key saved. Enter a new one to replace it.
admin.ai_settings_hint: Manage prompts by feature: GC, JStack, single-thread analysis, and ReAct Agent. References are injected into the corresponding analysis.
admin.ai_reset_confirm: Restore default prompts and clear feature-scoped references?
admin.ai_hint_gc: Used only by GC log AI analysis. If empty, the legacy global reference is used as fallback.
admin.ai_hint_jstack: Used only by full JStack AI analysis. If empty, the legacy global reference is used as fallback.
admin.ai_hint_thread: Used by single-thread stack analysis. If empty, falls back to JStack reference, then legacy global reference.
team.invite.no_smtp: Email not configured, copy the link manually
team.invite.copy_failed: Copy failed, please select and copy the link manually
team.seats_full: All seats taken, increase seats first
team.can_delete_sessions_hint: When enabled, this member can delete team sessions created by others; members can always delete their own sessions.
team.invite.wrong_account: This invitation belongs to {email}, please switch to the correct account
auth.reset_code_sent: Reset code sent to your email, please check it
auth.reset_success: Password reset successful, please login again
auth.password_changed: Password changed successfully, please login again
heapdump.upload_zone_text: Click or drag a .hprof / .hprof.gz file here
heapdump.upload_zone_hint: Supports plain and gzipped hprof. Large files upload in chunks; parsed by a background Worker.
heapdump.select_or_upload: Select a heap dump from the sidebar or upload a new file
heapdump.ai_empty: Attach the report to chat and ask the AI; conclusions will appear here.
heapdump.delete_confirm: Delete this report? (dump files on disk will also be removed)
heapdump.empty_state_hint: Pick a heap dump from the sidebar or upload a .hprof file to start analysis.
heapdump.leaks_failed: Leak analysis failed — ask AI in chat to retry
heapdump.ask_ai: 🤖 Ask AI to analyze this heap dump
heapdump.ask_ai_prompt: Please analyze this heap dump: what occupies the most memory? Are there leak suspects? Which classes/objects show abnormal growth?
heapdump.standalone_not_ready: Report is still being parsed; return to the main app to view progress
heapdump.pool_leaks_none_borrowed: No connections are currently borrowed (threshold {n} min)
heapdump.pool_leaks_summary_clean: {t} connections borrowed, none over threshold (threshold {n} min)
heapdump.sql_none: No SQL statements found in thread stacks
